name: PMSA003I
note: On the string; not one of the 22 PR #933 drivers.

name: MCP9808
jumper_setting: Three address pins: A0, A1, A2 with pull-down resi...
solder_action: set jumper 'Three address pins: A0, A1, A2 with pull-down resi...' (default 0x18 -> 0x19)
jumper_info: Three address pins: A0, A1, A2 with pull-down resistors. Connect to VDD to set high (read on power-up, must power cycle). Address = 0x18 + A0(1) + A1(2) + A2(4). Eight addresses: 0x18-0x1F.

name: PCT2075
jumper_setting: Three address pins A0, A1, A2 each support three s...
solder_action: set jumper 'Three address pins A0, A1, A2 each support three s...' (default 0x37 -> 0x35)
jumper_info: Three address pins A0, A1, A2 each support three states (high, low, floating) giving 27 possible addresses. All three float by default = 0x37. Solder jumpers on back connect each pin to GND or VCC. See guide for full 27-address map.

name: STEMMA QT Rotary Encoder
jumper_setting: Three jumper pads on back: A0, A1, A2. Address = 0...
solder_action: set jumper 'Three jumper pads on back: A0, A1, A2. Address = 0...' (default 0x36 -> 0x3C)
jumper_info: Three jumper pads on back: A0, A1, A2. Address = 0x36 + A0(1) + A1(2) + A2(4). All open: 0x36. Supports 8 addresses: 0x36-0x3D.

name: STEMMA Soil Sensor
jumper_setting: Two address jumper pads: AD0 and AD1. AD0 adds 1, ...
solder_action: set jumper 'Two address jumper pads: AD0 and AD1. AD0 adds 1, ...' (default 0x36 -> 0x37)
jumper_info: Two address jumper pads: AD0 and AD1. AD0 adds 1, AD1 adds 2 to base. Neither: 0x36. AD0 only: 0x37. AD1 only: 0x38. Both: 0x39. Supports 4 sensors.

name: TSL2591
jumper_setting: mux isolation
jumper_info: Fixed address 0x29, cannot be changed. Use I2C multiplexer for multiple sensors.

name: MLX90632 (Extended Mode)
jumper_setting: mux isolation
jumper_info: Same hardware as MLX90632B in extended mode. Default address 0x3A.

name: HTU31D
jumper_setting: ADDR:VDD
solder_action: set jumper 'ADDR:VDD' (default 0x40 -> 0x41)
jumper_info: ADDR pin selects address. Default (low) = 0x40. ADDR to VDD = 0x41. Two addresses available.

name: SHT3X
jumper_setting: mux isolation
jumper_info: ADR pin with 10K pull-down sets default 0x44. Tie ADR to Vin for 0x45. Uses breakout pin, not solder jumper.

name: BMP581
jumper_setting: SDO:GND
solder_action: set jumper 'SDO:GND' (default 0x47 -> 0x46)
jumper_info: SDO pin controls address. Default (SDO high) = 0x47. SDO to GND = 0x46. Bosch BMP5xx family.
note: The only BMP5xx that needs soldering at its assigned address.

name: ADT7410
jumper_setting: Two solder jumpers on back: A0 and A1. Address = 0...
solder_action: set jumper 'Two solder jumpers on back: A0 and A1. Address = 0...' (default 0x48 -> 0x49)
jumper_info: Two solder jumpers on back: A0 and A1. Address = 0x48 + A0(1) + A1(2). Both open: 0x48 (default). A0 closed: 0x49. A1 closed: 0x4A. Both closed: 0x4B.

name: TMP117
jumper_setting: ADDR/AD0 solder jumper on back. Default (open/pin ...
solder_action: set jumper 'ADDR/AD0 solder jumper on back. Default (open/pin ...' (default 0x48 -> 0x4B)
jumper_info: ADDR/AD0 solder jumper on back. Default (open/pin low) = 0x48. Jumper closed (pin high) = 0x49.

name: APDS9999
note: On the string; not a PR #933 driver.

name: SGP40
note: On the string now. Shares 0x59 with SGP41 but tests drvSgp40, NOT the PR's drvSgp41.

name: LPS25HB
jumper_setting: SDO pin selects address. Default (SDO floating/hig...
solder_action: set jumper 'SDO pin selects address. Default (SDO floating/hig...' (default 0x5D -> 0x5C)
jumper_info: SDO pin selects address. Default (SDO floating/high) = 0x5D. Pull SDO to GND = 0x5C.

name: BME280
jumper_setting: Solder ADDR jumper on back (or wire SDO to GND). D...
solder_action: set jumper 'Solder ADDR jumper on back (or wire SDO to GND). D...' (default 0x77 -> 0x76)
jumper_info: Solder ADDR jumper on back (or wire SDO to GND). Default (open/SDO high) = 0x77. Jumper closed (SDO to GND) = 0x76.
note: On the string (already at its non-default address); not a PR #933 driver.

name: INA219
jumper_setting: Two solder jumpers: A0 and A1. Bridging pulls pin ...
solder_action: set jumper 'Two solder jumpers: A0 and A1. Bridging pulls pin ...' (default 0x40 -> 0x41)
jumper_info: Two solder jumpers: A0 and A1. Bridging pulls pin to VIN. Four addresses: 0x40 (both open), 0x41 (A0), 0x44 (A1), 0x45 (A0+A1).

name: HDC302x
solder_action: set jumper 'A0:1' (default 0x44 -> 0x45)
jumper_info: Two solder jumpers on back: A0 and A1. Address = 0x44 + A0(1) + A1(2). Both open: 0x44 (default). A0 closed: 0x45. A1 closed: 0x46. Both closed: 0x47.

name: ENS160
note: On the string; not a PR #933 driver.

name: ENS161
jumper_setting: One solder jumper on back labeled 'Addr', plus SDO...
solder_action: set jumper 'One solder jumper on back labeled 'Addr', plus SDO...' (default 0x52 -> 0x53)
jumper_info: One solder jumper on back labeled 'Addr', plus SDO pin. Default (open) = 0x53. Closed (SDO to GND) = 0x52.

name: SGP41
note: Needs a REAL SGP41 — the attached SGP40 answers at 0x59 but tests drvSgp40, not this driver.

name: BME680
jumper_setting: Wire SDO to GND to change address. Default = 0x77....
solder_action: set jumper 'Wire SDO to GND to change address. Default = 0x77....' (default 0x77 -> 0x76)
jumper_info: Wire SDO to GND to change address. Default = 0x77. SDO to GND = 0x76.

name: INA228
solder_action: set jumper 'A0:1' (default 0x40 -> 0x41)
jumper_info: Two solder jumpers on back: A0 and A1. Four addresses: 0x40 (both open), 0x41 (A0), 0x44 (A1), 0x45 (A0+A1). TI chip supports 16 but Adafruit board exposes 4.

name: INA237
solder_action: set jumper 'A0:1 A1:1' (default 0x40 -> 0x45)
jumper_info: Two solder jumpers on back: A0 and A1. Four addresses: 0x40 (both open), 0x41 (A0), 0x44 (A1), 0x45 (A0+A1).

name: BME688
jumper_setting: Same as BME680 — wire SDO to GND. Default = 0x77. ...
solder_action: set jumper 'Same as BME680 — wire SDO to GND. Default = 0x77. ...' (default 0x77 -> 0x76)
jumper_info: Same as BME680 — wire SDO to GND. Default = 0x77. SDO to GND = 0x76.

name: INA238
solder_action: set jumper 'A0:1' (default 0x40 -> 0x41)
jumper_info: Two solder jumpers on back: A0 and A1. Four addresses: 0x40 (both open), 0x41 (A0), 0x44 (A1), 0x45 (A0+A1). Covered under INA237 guide.

name: INA260
solder_action: set jumper 'A0:1 A1:1' (default 0x40 -> 0x45)
jumper_info: Two solder jumpers: A0 and A1. Bridging pulls pin to VCC. Four addresses: 0x40 (both open), 0x41 (A0), 0x44 (A1), 0x45 (A0+A1).

name: BMP280
jumper_setting: SDO pin controls address. Default (SDO high) = 0x7...
solder_action: set jumper 'SDO pin controls address. Default (SDO high) = 0x7...' (default 0x77 -> 0x76)
jumper_info: SDO pin controls address. Default (SDO high) = 0x77. SDO to GND = 0x76. Older board revision exposes SDO pin; newer has solder jumper.

name: BMP388
jumper_setting: ADDR solder jumper on board. Default (open) = 0x77...
solder_action: set jumper 'ADDR solder jumper on board. Default (open) = 0x77...' (default 0x77 -> 0x76)
jumper_info: ADDR solder jumper on board. Default (open) = 0x77. Jumper closed = 0x76.

name: BMP390
jumper_setting: ADDR solder jumper on board. Default (open) = 0x77...
solder_action: set jumper 'ADDR solder jumper on board. Default (open) = 0x77...' (default 0x77 -> 0x76)
jumper_info: ADDR solder jumper on board. Default (open) = 0x77. Jumper closed = 0x76. Same guide as BMP388.

name: DPS310
jumper_setting: SDO/ADR solder jumper on back. Default (open) = 0x...
solder_action: set jumper 'SDO/ADR solder jumper on back. Default (open) = 0x...' (default 0x77 -> 0x76)
jumper_info: SDO/ADR solder jumper on back. Default (open) = 0x77. Bridge jumper (SDO to GND) = 0x76.

name: SPA06-003
jumper_setting: SDO:GND
solder_action: set jumper 'SDO:GND' (default 0x77 -> 0x76)
jumper_info: One ADDR jumper pad (SDO pin) on back. Default (open) = 0x77. Solder closed (SDO to GND) = 0x76.
